title: CPM Delay Penalty Optimizer
description: Industrial-grade tool for optimizing delay penalties in Critical Path Method (CPM) project schedules, incorporating lean construction principles and Six Sigma variability reduction.

inputs.label: Planned Duration (Days)
inputs.businessContext: Total planned duration of the project from start to finish, as per CPM schedule baseline.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total planned duration of the project from start to finish, as per CPM schedule baseline.
businessContext_i18n.tr: CPM takvimi baz alınarak projenin başlangıcından bitişine kadar planlanan toplam süre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte geplante Projektdauer von Anfang bis Ende gemäß CPM-Zeitplanbasis.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée totale prévue du projet du début à la fin, selon la référence du planning CPM.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración total planificada del proyecto desde el inicio hasta el final, según la línea base del cronograma CPM.

inputs.label: Actual Duration (Days)
inputs.businessContext: Actual elapsed duration from project start to current date or completion.

businessContext_i18n.en: Actual elapsed duration from project start to current date or completion.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Proje başlangıcından bugüne veya tamamlanmaya kadar geçen gerçek süre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Tatsächliche vergangene Dauer vom Projektstart bis zum aktuellen Datum oder Abschluss.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée réelle écoulée depuis le début du projet jusqu'à la date actuelle ou la fin.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración real transcurrida desde el inicio del proyecto hasta la fecha actual o finalización.

inputs.label: Daily Penalty Rate (Currency)
inputs.businessContext: Contractual liquidated damages or penalty per day of delay beyond the planned duration.

businessContext_i18n.en: Contractual liquidated damages or penalty per day of delay beyond the planned duration.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Planlanan sürenin ötesindeki her gecikme günü için sözleşmeye bağlı gecikme cezası veya tazminat.
businessContext_i18n.de: Vertragliche Verzugsschäden oder Strafe pro Tag Verzug über die geplante Dauer hinaus.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dommages-intérêts contractuels ou pénalité par jour de retard au-delà de la durée prévue.
businessContext_i18n.es: Daños y perjuicios contractuales o penalización por día de retraso más allá de la duración planificada.

inputs.label: Total Float on Critical Path (Days)
inputs.businessContext: Sum of total float for all activities on the critical path. Zero or negative indicates schedule compression.

label_i18n.fr: Marge totale sur le chemin critique (jours)
label_i18n.es: Holgura total en la ruta crítica (días)

businessContext_i18n.en: Sum of total float for all activities on the critical path. Zero or negative indicates schedule compression.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kritik yoldaki tüm faaliyetlerin toplam bollaşma toplamı. Sıfır veya negatif, program sıkışmasını gösterir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Summe der Gesamtpuffer aller Aktivitäten auf dem kritischen Pfad. Null oder negativ zeigt eine Verdichtung des Zeitplans an.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Somme des marges totales pour toutes les activités du chemin critique. Zéro ou négatif indique une compression du planning.
businessContext_i18n.es: Suma de la holgura total de todas las actividades en la ruta crítica. Cero o negativo indica compresión del cronograma.

inputs.label: Productivity Factor (0-1)
inputs.businessContext: Lean metric: ratio of actual output to standard output. Values below 0.8 indicate significant waste.

businessContext_i18n.en: Lean metric: ratio of actual output to standard output. Values below 0.8 indicate significant waste.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yalın metrik: gerçek çıktının standart çıktıya oranı. 0,8'in altındaki değerler önemli israfı gösterir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Lean-Kennzahl: Verhältnis von tatsächlichem Output zu Standard-Output. Werte unter 0,8 deuten auf erhebliche Verschwendung hin.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Métrique Lean : rapport entre la production réelle et la production standard. Des valeurs inférieures à 0,8 indiquent un gaspillage important.
businessContext_i18n.es: Métrica Lean: relación entre la producción real y la producción estándar. Valores por debajo de 0,8 indican desperdicio significativo.

inputs.label: Rework Percentage (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of completed work requiring rework, a key Six Sigma quality metric.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of completed work requiring rework, a key Six Sigma quality metric.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tamamlanan işin yeniden işleme gerektiren yüzdesi, önemli bir Altı Sigma kalite metriği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der abgeschlossenen Arbeiten, die Nacharbeit erfordern, eine wichtige Six-Sigma-Qualitätskennzahl.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage des travaux terminés nécessitant une reprise, une métrique clé de la qualité Six Sigma.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de trabajo completado que requiere retrabajo, una métrica clave de calidad Seis Sigma.

inputs.label: Delay Type
inputs.businessContext: Classification per standard construction delay analysis (AACE, SCL protocols).

businessContext_i18n.en: Classification per standard construction delay analysis (AACE, SCL protocols).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart inşaat gecikme analizine (AACE, SCL protokolleri) göre sınıflandırma.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Classification selon l'analyse standard des retards de construction (protocoles AACE, SCL).
businessContext_i18n.es: Clasificación según el análisis estándar de retrasos en la construcción (protocolos AACE, SCL).

inputs.label: Use Earned Schedule Method
inputs.businessContext: If true, applies earned schedule (ES) metrics for more accurate delay impact assessment.

label_i18n.fr: Utiliser la méthode de l'échéancier acquis

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, applies earned schedule (ES) metrics for more accurate delay impact assessment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğruysa, gecikme etkisi değerlendirmesi için daha doğru kazanılmış çizelge (ES) metriklerini uygular.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn wahr, werden Earned-Schedule-Kennzahlen (ES) für eine genauere Bewertung der Verzögerungsauswirkungen angewendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si vrai, applique les métriques de l'échéancier acquis (ES) pour une évaluation plus précise de l'impact des retards.
businessContext_i18n.es: Si es verdadero, aplica métricas de cronograma ganado (ES) para una evaluación más precisa del impacto del retraso.

rules.message: Actual duration must be greater than or equal to planned duration to calculate delay penalty.
Negative total float indicates schedule compression; penalty may be underestimated.
Productivity factor below 0.8 suggests systemic waste; consider lean interventions.
Rework above 15% indicates poor quality control; Six Sigma DMAIC recommended.
Compensable delays may shift penalty liability to owner; verify contract terms.

thresholds.message: Total penalty exceeds 100,000 currency units; escalate to project board.
Critical path float is 2 days or less; high risk of further delay.
Productivity factor below 0.6; immediate process improvement required.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
